hidden_state.wab_instruction: Find the oldest unread email from each of your VIP contacts (look for emails with the 'VIP' label). Mark each one as starred and reply with the exact phrase '{target.status_phrase}'. Then create a filter that automatically stars future mail from {target.future_vip_email}.

task_completion_criteria.status_phrase: Status update: I am actively on it.
